message:
feat(auth): extension OAuth support — start, complete, and refresh flows

Add end-to-end OAuth support for extension-registered providers, enabling
extensions to declare OAuth configuration that Pi uses for browser-based
authorization flows.

Core additions:

- OAuthConfig struct in models.rs: auth_url, token_url, client_id,
  scopes, redirect_uri — captures the OAuth endpoints and parameters
  that an extension provider declares in its manifest
- ModelEntry gains oauth_config: Option<OAuthConfig> field, threaded
  through all construction sites (built-in providers set None)
- start_extension_oauth() in auth.rs: generates PKCE challenge
  (S256), builds authorization URL with state/code_challenge params,
  returns OAuthStartInfo for browser redirect
- complete_extension_oauth() in auth.rs: exchanges authorization code
  for tokens via the extension's token endpoint
- refresh_extension_oauth_token() in auth.rs: refreshes expired tokens
  using the refresh_token grant type
- refresh_expired_extension_oauth_tokens() on AuthStorage: iterates
  provider credentials, skips built-in "anthropic", refreshes any
  expired extension OAuth tokens
- interactive.rs /login command: now looks up OAuth config from
  available_models for extension providers, calls start_extension_oauth
  if found, stores config in PendingOAuth for completion callback
- handle_oauth_completion: routes to complete_extension_oauth when
  PendingOAuth carries an extension OAuthConfig

Tests (7 new in auth.rs):
- PKCE format validation, required params in auth URL, empty scopes,
  missing redirect_uri, skip-anthropic, skip-unexpired, skip-unknown

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -36,6 +36,7 @@ fn make_model_entry(provider: &str, model_id: &str, base_url: &str) -> ModelEntr
         headers: HashMap::new(),
         auth_header: false,
         compat: None,
+        oauth_config: None,
     }
 }
